package rulefixtures

import (
	"encoding/json"
)

// scenario for json_number_vs_float64_decode: `json.Unmarshal` into `map[string]any` for numeric data without `UseNumber()`
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: warning.
type Rule609PositiveRecord struct { Name string `json:"name"`; Count int `json:"count"` }

func scenario609Positive(values []Rule609PositiveRecord) (int, error) {
	total := 0
	for _, value := range values {
		data, err := json.Marshal(value)
		if err != nil { return 0, err }
		total += len(data)
	}
	return total, nil
}
